name: threatbook-onesig
description: OctoBus package for ThreatBook OneSIG inbound blacklist block, list, and unblock APIs.

ThreatBook_OneSIG.ThreatBook_OneSIG/Batc.name: batch-block-ip
ThreatBook_OneSIG.ThreatBook_OneSIG/Batc.description: Batch add inbound blacklist IP entries in ThreatBook OneSIG.

ThreatBook_OneSIG.ThreatBook_OneSIG/List.name: list-inbound-blacklist-entries
ThreatBook_OneSIG.ThreatBook_OneSIG/List.description: List inbound blacklist entries from ThreatBook OneSIG.

ThreatBook_OneSIG.ThreatBook_OneSIG/Batc.name: batch-unblock-by-entry-ids
ThreatBook_OneSIG.ThreatBook_OneSIG/Batc.description: Batch remove inbound blacklist entries by ID in ThreatBook OneSIG.
